items.title: Nicaragua: Radio Stereo Romance forcibly silenced after 31 years on air

The Nicaraguan authorities cancelled the station’s FM frequencies and physically removed its transmission equipment, a new lo...

items.title: Todd Blanche targets press, leakers as acting attorney general
items.summary: As President Donald Trump’s second term continued in 2026, he removed Pam Bondi as attorney general. Her deputy, now acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, joined Trump in efforts to punish and intimidate news outlets that have covered Trump and his administration critically. items.title: Investigation into Guatemalan journalist’s murder must consider link to his work

items.title: Unprecedented proceeding against Google opens way to fair compensation for journalism in Brazil
items.summary: For the first time in Brazil, the competition authority has opened a proceeding against a tech giant to investigate the harm it caused to journalism. It has been launched into Google News and Google’s search engine, whose features utilise generative artificial intelligence (AI). Reporters Without...

items.title: Consejos de autocuidado para periodistas: una pausa también es defender el oficio
items.summary: El trabajo periodístico exige atención constante, capacidad de reacción, jornadas intensas y, muchas veces, exposición a situaciones complejas. El autocuidado es una práctica necesaria para sostener la capacidad de seguir ejerciendo el oficio. Desde la Red Centroamericana de Periodistas compartim...

items.title: Senate Must Reject House's Blank Check on Spying Authority
items.summary: “Today, 42 Democrats joined 192 Republicans to co-sign Donald Trump and Stephen Miller’s domestic surveillance agenda, jeopardizing the civil rights and liberties of every person in the United States,” says Jenna Ruddock.
